s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR BUMPER ASSEMBLY (w/o Rear Lower Spoiler)

s2.ptxt: Put protective tape around the rear bumper assembly.
Using a screwdriver, open the 2 rear bumper plates.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 12 claws and disconnect the rear bumper assembly as shown in the illustration.

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedures for the RH side and LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR FLOOR BOARD (w/ Rear Lower Spoiler)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 4 screws, 2 clips, 3 nuts and rear floor board.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR BUMPER ASSEMBLY (w/ Rear Lower Spoiler)

s2.ptxt: Put protective tape around the rear bumper assembly.
Using a screwdriver, open the 2 rear bumper plates.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 12 claws and disconnect the rear bumper assembly as shown in the illustration.

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedures for the RH side and LH side.
